mapper.sql: id, user_id, provider_id, provider_type, provider_name, config_name, api_key, custom_api_base_url, model_name, priority, is_active, is_default, timeout_ms, max_retries, stream_enabled, capability, extra_config, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select
from llm_user_config where user_id = #{userId} and capability = #{capability} and is_active = true and is_default = true order by priority desc, id asc limit 1

select
from llm_user_config where user_id = #{userId} and is_active = true and is_default = true order by capability asc, priority desc, id asc
